blocks.text: Liverpool vs Spurs Headline Sunday — Plus Hovland Chases PLAYERS Glory

Sunday delivers a full slate of high-stakes football alongside Norwegian ambitions in golf and cycling. Liverpool host Spurs in a potential title decider, while Hovland and Reitan take on TPC Sawgrass in golf's showpiece event.
⛳ THE PLAYERS Championship — Hovland trails leader Åberg as Round 3 continues at TPC Sawgrass
🚴 Tirreno-Adriatico 2026 — Stage underway; Leknessund and Wærenskjold carry Norwegian hopes on Italian roads
